title: Rich Roasted Saudi Arabian Snow Peas Bowl
description: A savory and silky Saudi Arabian dish featuring roasted snow peas, served in a stone bowl, low in glycemic index, perfect for a cozy dinner. This recipe combines the flavors of the Middle East with the comfort of a warm bowl.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the snow peas and pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, minced garlic, grated ginger, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the snow peas to the bowl and toss to coat with the oil and spice mixture.
Spread the snow peas in a single layer on a baking sheet.
Roast the snow peas in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.
Remove the snow peas from the oven and squeeze the lemon juice over them.
Serve the roasted snow peas in a stone bowl, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Repeat the recipe as needed to serve a larger crowd.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
